title: resume-task.sh parsing bug fix
description: Fix the porcelain parsing bug in resume-task.sh. The issue is that `git worktree list --porcelain` outputs entries separated by blank lines, and `while read -r line` terminates early on blank lines, causing incomplete worktree path parsing.
implementation: Replace `while read -r line` with `while IFS= read -r line` or restructure the parsing logic to properly handle blank line separators from porcelain output.
convergence: Create 3+ worktrees and run resume-task.sh — all slugs/paths/branches parsed correctly
